name: @neutree-ai/skills
description: NAP Agent Skills — generated REST-API skills plus hand-authored skills (e.g. the design system)

scripts.fetch:cp: curl -fsSL "${CP_SPEC_URL:?set CP_SPEC_URL to a running control-plane, e.g. http://localhost:3000/api/docs/openapi.json}" -o specs/control-plane.json
scripts.generate:cp: npx -y openapi-to-skills@0.3.2 ./specs/control-plane.json -o . -n nap-api -f -t templates --assets assets/nap-api --excludeTags me,workspace-layouts,teamwork,invites --excludePaths '/api/workspaces/{id}/profile' --excludeDeprecated
scripts.cp: npm run fetch:cp && npm run generate:cp
